# netbox_prefix (Resource)

Manages a NetBox prefix.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a prefix manually
resource "netbox_prefix" "example" {
  prefix      = "10.0.0.0/24"
  status      = "active"
  vrf         = netbox_vrf.example.id
  tenant      = netbox_tenant.example.id
  description = "Example network prefix"

  tags = [
    {
      name = "production"
      slug = "production"
    }
  ]
}

# Create a parent prefix
resource "netbox_prefix" "parent" {
  prefix      = "172.16.0.0/16"
  status      = "container"
  description = "Parent prefix for auto-allocation"
}

# Auto-assign prefix from parent
resource "netbox_prefix" "auto_allocated" {
  autoassign       = true
  parent_prefix_id = netbox_prefix.parent.id
  prefix_length    = 24
  status           = "active"
  tenant           = netbox_tenant.example.id
  description      = "Auto-allocated from parent"

  tags = [
    {
      name = "auto-assigned"
      slug = "auto-assigned"
    }
  ]
}

# Auto-assign with upsert: reuse existing prefix with same tenant/tags if found
resource "netbox_prefix" "auto_with_upsert" {
  autoassign       = true
  upsert           = true
  parent_prefix_id = netbox_prefix.parent.id
  prefix_length    = 24
  status           = "active"
  tenant           = netbox_tenant.example.id
  description      = "Will reuse existing prefix if found"

  tags = [
    {
      name = "reusable"
      slug = "reusable"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `autoassign` (Boolean) If true, automatically allocate a prefix from parent_prefix_id. Requires parent_prefix_id and prefix_length.
- `comments` (String) Additional comments.
- `description` (String) Description of the prefix.
- `parent_prefix_id` (Number) Parent prefix ID to allocate from when autoassign is true.
- `prefix` (String) IP prefix in CIDR notation (e.g., '10.0.0.0/24'). Optional when autoassign is true.
- `prefix_length` (Number) Prefix length for auto-allocated prefix (e.g., 24 for /24). Required when autoassign is true.
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with this prefix. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `tenant` (Number) Tenant ID that owns this prefix.
- `upsert` (Boolean) If true, will find and use existing prefix with matching CIDR instead of creating a new one.
- `vrf` (Number) VRF ID that contains this prefix.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) NetBox internal ID.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `slug` (String) Tag slug.
